name: Grilled Salmon with Lemon & Thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. Place salmon fillets on a heavy large baking sheet.
2. Rub Cognac over both sides of the fish.
3. Mix together all remaining ingredients in a small bowl.
4. Rub the mixture over both sides of the fish.
5. Cover with plastic wrap and place another baking sheet on top, weighting it down with a heavy object.
6. Refrigerate for at least 6 hours or overnight.
7. Prepare the barbecue for medium-high heat.
8. Grill the fish until cooked through, about 3 minutes per side.
9. Transfer to plates and serve.
Note: Bon Appetit recommends using a sturdy red wine, such as a Beaujolais from Moulin-a-Vent. Serving with sauteed zucchini is also suggested. You could grill sliced zucchini next to the fish, ensuring they are thick enough and cut on a strong diagonal. Fresh green beans cooked in butter with freshly ground pepper would complement the dish well.
